summary: Escalation Analytics Dashboard (Step 2 - Frontend UI) testing complete. All frontend tests PASSED. Safety Ops page accessible from operator sidebar, displays all KPI cards (Total Incidents, Open, Device Instability, Repeat Rate), Tier Distribution bar chart with L1/L2/L3 color coding, Response Timings (avg ack, resolve, first escalation with dash for null), Recovery Quality (auto vs manual bar, Case A/B paths), Alert Fatigue indicators (Cooldown Blocks, Repeat Device Rate), and Top Devices table with correct columns. Window selector (15min to 7 days) and Refresh button working correctly. RBAC verified: guardian users see Family Dashboard, cannot access operator pages.

frontend.page_navigation: PASS - Safety Ops page loads from sidebar via data-testid='op-nav-escalation-analytics'
frontend.kpi_total_incidents: PASS - Displays total incidents count (17 in 24h, 57 in 7d)
frontend.kpi_open_incidents: PASS - Displays open incidents count (12 in 24h, 33 in 7d)
frontend.kpi_repeat_rate: PASS - Displays repeat device rate percentage (50%)
frontend.tier_distribution_card: PASS - Tier Distribution card with bar chart present
frontend.tier_bar_colors: PASS - L1=amber, L2=orange, L3=red color coding in bar
frontend.tier_stats: PASS - L1/L2/L3 stats display (24h: L1=5, L2=0, L3=12; 7d: L1=16, L2=3, L3=38)
frontend.timing_ack: PASS - Avg Time to Acknowledge shows dash (—) when null, 8m in 7d
frontend.timing_resolve: PASS - Avg Time to Resolve shows 19m in 24h, 13.3h in 7d
frontend.timing_first_esc: PASS - Avg Time to First Escalation shows 6m in 24h, 42m in 7d
frontend.recovery_bar: PASS - Auto vs Manual bar with percentages (60%/40%)
frontend.recovery_path_a: PASS - Case A (No anomaly in window) shows count (2)
frontend.recovery_path_b: PASS - Case B (Clear cycles below hysteresis) shows count (1)
frontend.noise_card: PASS - Alert Fatigue Indicators card present
frontend.top_devices_card: PASS - Top Devices by Instability card present
frontend.top_devices_table: PASS - Table with columns: Device, Senior, Guardian, Incidents, Avg Score
frontend.loading_state: PASS - Loading spinner shows during data fetch
frontend.rbac_operator_access: PASS - Operator can access Safety Ops page
frontend.rbac_guardian_blocked: PASS - Guardian sees Family Dashboard, no Safety Ops nav link

critical_code_review_comments: EscalationAnalytics.jsx implements all required features correctly
data-testid attributes properly added to all interactive elements
formatDuration helper correctly formats seconds to s/m/h and shows dash for null
TierBar component correctly calculates percentages and applies color coding
RecoveryBreakdown shows auto/manual percentages and Case A/B recovery paths
Window selector dropdown with all 6 time ranges (15min to 7d)
Loading state properly handled with Loader2 spinner
Top devices table shows device_identifier, senior_name, guardian_name, instability_count, avg_score
seed_data_creation: Used existing incident data. Current data: 24h window (17 total, 12 open, 5 instability), 7d window (57 total, 33 open, 5 instability).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Escalation Analytics Dashboard (Safety Ops) fully tested. Backend (29/29 tests) and Frontend (30/30 tests) all passing. Page accessible at /operator/escalation-analytics via sidebar. Data-testids: analytics-title, analytics-window-select, analytics-refresh, kpi-total-incidents, kpi-open-incidents, kpi-instability-total, kpi-repeat-rate, analytics-tier-card, tier-bar, tier-stat-l1/l2/l3, analytics-timing-card, timing-ack/resolve/first-esc, analytics-recovery-card, recovery-bar/path-a/path-b, analytics-noise-card, noise-cooldown-blocks/repeat-rate, analytics-top-devices-card, top-devices-table, top-device-row-N. Window selector supports 15min, 1h, 6h, 24h (default), 3d, 7d.
